papers.title: Trust the Batch, On- or Off-Policy: Adaptive Policy Optimization for RL Post-Training
papers.central_question: Can the current batch quantify behavior-policy mismatch and set both policy-gradient weighting and off-policy regularization without a fixed clipping factor?

papers.title: RoFormer: Enhanced Transformer with Rotary Position Embedding
papers.central_question: Can absolute position be encoded in query and key representations while their inner product depends explicitly on relative position?
